response:
module1: the initial 5-digit prime number is 12347.  
module2: the sum of the squares of the digits of 12347 is 1² + 2² + 3² + 4² + 7² = 1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 49 = 79.  
module3: the prime number at age 14 is 101, at age 15 is 107, at age 16 is 131, at age 17 is 149, at age 18 is 167, and at age 19 is 179.  
module4: each prime is greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number. player
